title: Production Evals For Agentic AI Systems - Nishant Gupta, Meta Superintelligence Labs
summary: Nishant Gupta from Meta discusses production evaluation approaches for autonomous AI agents that go beyond offline benchmarks. The talk covers continuous evaluation pipelines, online vs offline evaluation architectures, human-in-the-loop systems, and methods for detecting drift and hallucinations in agentic workflows at scale.
writeup: Nishant Gupta of Meta Superintelligence Labs lays out how to evaluate autonomous AI agents in production, moving past offline benchmarks toward continuous evaluation pipelines. The talk contrasts online and offline evaluation architectures, covers human-in-the-loop systems, and addresses methods for detecting drift and hallucinations in agentic workflows at scale. It matters because agents that use tools and run structured workflows need observability and ongoing checks rather than one-time benchmark scores. Key threads include separated evaluation and the operational design of evaluation pipelines that run alongside live systems.
